zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Guines於大約1260年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，她的父親Comte Arnould III de Guines36歲，母親Alix de Coucy37歲。她於1279年2月27日與Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster在愛爾蘭康瑙特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年1月9日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Guines
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Guines was born about 1260, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Comte Arnould III de Guines, was 36 and her mother, Alix de Coucy, was 37. She married Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster on 27 February 1279, in Connaught, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 9 January 1304, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.County Tyrone, Northern Ireland, United: County Tyrone, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Guines est née environ 1260, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Comte Arnould III de Guines, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alix de Coucy, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster le 27 février 1279, à Connaught, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1304, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Guines um 1260 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Comte Arnould III de Guines 36 und ihre Mutter Alix de Coucy 37. Sie hat am 27. Februar 1279 in Connaught, Irland Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1304 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster il 27 febbraio 1279, nel Connaught, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1304, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Guinesが約1260年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Comte Arnould III de Guinesは36歳，母Alix de Coucyは37歳であった。1279年2月27日にアイルランドコナウトでRichard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年1月9日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Guines(이)가 대략 1260년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Comte Arnould III de Guines(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Coucy(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1279년 2월 27일 아일랜드 콘오트에서 Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster em 27 de fevereiro de 1279, em Connaught, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Guines родилась около 1260 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Comte Arnould III de Guines было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Coucy, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Burgh 2nd Earl of Ulster 27 февраля 1279 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 9 января 1304 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
